must_have_quals: Hands-on with Docker and cloud infrastructure (Either GCP or AWS preferred), Understanding of basic networking fundamentals and security best practices, Past experience dealing with messy, real-world data at scale and have opinions about how to handle it, Past experience thinking about performance implications before they become problems, Past experience explaining complex technical tradeoffs to non-technical stakeholders, Past experience writing code that other engineers can easily maintain, Bachelor's degree, 3+ years building production software with Python (strong OOP fundamentals), 3+ years with relational and NoSQL databases, 3+ years collaborating with Git in team environments
core_responsibilities: Design and maintain our AI-powered provider data enrichment engines, Architect new solutions that integrate with 3rd-party data sources to augment our internal data stores, Use AI-assisted development workflows to produce high-quality code and tests, Analyze, review, and provide constructive feedback for peer engineers’ technical solutions, Participate in vetting requirements, writing technical specs and documentation, and creating technical diagrams
job_summary: RevSpring is a company focused on AI-powered solutions for data enrichment. The Software Engineer on the Enrichment team will design systems that enhance existing data and derive new insights, while collaborating closely with fellow engineers and utilizing AI-assisted development workflows.
